verdict: High risk of displacement by AI

timeline.description: LLMs can already perform many tasks typically associated with human intelligence, such as learning, reasoning, and problem-solving.
AI systems can process and analyze large amounts of data quickly and accurately, making them well-suited for tasks that require pattern-matching on text/data.

key_tasks: Developing and improving artificial intelligence systems
Analyzing data to identify trends and patterns

comparisons.description: AI Researcher vs. Software Developer: While both roles involve working with AI, the AI Researcher is more focused on developing new AI systems and techniques.

evidence_ledger.task: Developing and improving artificial intelligence systems
Analyzing data to identify trends and patterns

reasoning_steps: The AI Researcher role is highly susceptible to displacement by AI due to the growing capabilities of LLMs.
While some tasks may require human intuition or creativity, many can be automated with current technology.

adjacent_careers.description: Software Developer: While not directly related to AI research, software developers work closely with AI systems and can benefit from adjacent skills.

action_plan.description: Take courses in machine learning and data analysis to develop relevant skills for the AI Researcher role.

follow_up_suggestions.description: Research the latest developments in AI research and their potential impact on the field.

quotes.quote: AlphaFold has predicted the structure of nearly every known protein. Tasks that took a PhD student years now take seconds. The bottleneck has moved to the experiments and the questions.
quotes.speaker: Demis Hassabis
quotes.title: CEO, Google DeepMind; Nobel laureate in Chemistry 2024

quotes.quote: AI is the most profound technology humanity is working on, more profound than fire or electricity. In science it is already changing what is knowable.
quotes.speaker: Sundar Pichai
quotes.title: CEO, Google / Alphabet

quotes.quote: I can imagine a world where AI agents run thousands of experiments in parallel, and the human scientist's role becomes one of asking the right question and interpreting the result.
quotes.speaker: Fei-Fei Li
quotes.title: Co-Director, Stanford Institute for Human-Centered AI
quotes.source: The Worlds I See / public lectures

recent_developments.headline: AlphaFold reshapes structural biology research
recent_developments.impact: Predicted protein structures are now a default starting point for experimental design.

recent_developments.headline: AI accelerates materials discovery
recent_developments.impact: Self-driving labs at DeepMind and academic partners produce new candidate materials at unprecedented rates.

recent_developments.headline: Field research adopts AI-powered sensing
recent_developments.impact: Computer vision and bioacoustics tools are standard in ecology, conservation, and marine surveys.
